items.title: Composable Core Banking Platform Release
items.description: Release of Composable Core Banking Platform improvements covering product configuration engine, modular domain architecture across Operations and Product Console, Core Banking APIs.

customerKPIs.kpi: Time to Launch New Banking Products
customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve time to launch new banking products through stronger product configuration engine support and cleaner workflow execution.
Improve delivery speed through stronger modular domain architecture support and cleaner workflow execution.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve annual platform value realized through stronger product configuration engine support and cleaner workflow execution.
Improve growth through stronger modular domain architecture support and cleaner workflow execution.

productBricks.change: Released Product Configuration Engine with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Released Modular Domain Architecture with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Released Customer and Account Migration Toolkit with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Released Ledger and Accounting Core with domain-specific workflow improvements.

deliveryChannels.change: Deployed workflow updates in Operations and Product Console.
Deployed workflow updates in Core Banking APIs.
Deployed workflow updates in Migration and Platform Dashboard.
